description: Structured information extracted from unstructured text

summary.description: A concise 1-3 sentence summary of the input

people.description: People explicitly mentioned in the text

name.description: Full name or best available identifier

role.description: Role, title, or relationship to the text

email.description: Email address if present, otherwise empty string

organizations.description: Organizations explicitly mentioned in the text

key_facts.description: Important facts, claims, or findings from the text

dates_and_events.description: Dates or time references paired with their related events

date.description: Date, time, or time reference as written or normalized when obvious

action_items.description: Concrete tasks, follow-ups, or decisions that need action
